title: Broadcom Symantec DLP Incidents by Policy and Severity
dataSources: `sourcetype=symantec:dlp:incident` Symantec DLP incident exports or syslog-forwarded incidents
app: Splunk Add-on for Symantec Data Loss Prevention (vendor / partner TA) or custom HEC parser to `symantec:dlp:incident`
spl:
index=dlp sourcetype="symantec:dlp:incident" earliest=-7d
| eval policy=coalesce(Policy_Name, policy_name, Policy, "unknown")
| eval sev=coalesce(Severity, severity, Incident_Severity, "medium")
| eval user=coalesce(User, user, Owner, owner, "")
| stats count by policy sev
| sort -count
description: DLP incidents show where sensitive data is leaving the organization. Rolling up counts by policy and severity highlights chronic problem areas, mis-tuned rules, and priority queues for analyst review.
value: Quantifies data-exfiltration risk for privacy and IP programs and helps balance false positives against real policy breaches.
implementation: (1) Forward DLP incidents into `index=dlp` with consistent severity normalization. (2) Map policies to data classification labels. (3) Dashboard for SOC and DPO review. (4) Alert on sustained high-severity counts. (5) Integrate with SOAR for tier-1 triage.
visualization: Heatmap (policy × severity), stacked bar, drillable table with sample incident IDs.

references.title: Broadcom Symantec Data Loss Prevention documentation hub

grandmaExplanation: We summarize Broadcom Symantec data-loss alerts by rule and seriousness so privacy teams know where leaks keep happening.
